clean_story:
Now I will teach you Music.

Listen—when big storm wind howls through tree holes, long and sad, then happy when sun comes. That sound? Like voice but no words, just feeling—happy, scared, strong. When you hit hard rock with stick, thok-thok, or rub tight skin over fire-pit hum, that is same. Your chest shakes, feet want to stomp, fire burns brighter—sound makes body move without thinking. If many do together, same time, same sound, it binds like pack hunting. You know Music.
